title: All the best from Integromat

posts.author: Michaela_Staffova (Michaela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Heya lovely folks of the community

I just wanted to stop by and wish you all a wonderful rest of the festive season and all the best in 2022

I am a huge fan of the monday community and I am very impressed by how helpful everyone here is. To all of you guys: you are doing a great job!

Let’s hope 2022 will be a good one
Wishing you all tons of fun and success from everyone over here at Integromat!

PF-Partners1200×350 51.2 KB

PS: I am sharing this in the ‘Workflows’ category because we specialize in workflow automation Hope that’s ok.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Michaela_Staffova

Wishing you and the Integromat team happy holidays and a wonderful 2022 from all of us at monday.com!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: @Michaela_Staffova Merci!! Our favorite integration engine! Same to the Integromat team!
